author: gb9t
content: Iter 88 result: net/core/neighbour.md (ARP/NDP table - neighbour.c ~3968 lines; per-protocol NeighTable + per-(table, dev, addr) Neighbour with NUD state-machine NONEâ†’INCOMPLETEâ†’REACHABLEâ†’STALEâ†’DELAYâ†’PROBEâ†’FAILED + per-entry timer + per-table GC with gc_thresh1/2/3 + RCU-protected hash + proxy entries (pneigh) + IPv4 ARP + IPv6 NDP shared table) + virt/kvm/x86-fpu.md (FPU/XSAVE virtualization - in x86.c ~300-400 lines; per-vCPU guest_fpu + fpstate (XSAVE-area) + XCR0 shadow + XFD lazy-alloc for AMX 8KB + kvm_load/_put_guest_fpu via XSAVE/XRSTOR + per-vmenter swap hostâ†”guest + fpstate_realloc on XSETBV + confidential FPU SEV-ES/TDX + KVM_GET_XSAVE2/_GET_XCRS migration). Pivoted from dm-zone (already covered in dm-core overview) to net/core/neighbour for breadth. 126 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/core/dev.md (netdev core dispatch) + virt/kvm/x86-cr0-cr4.md (CR0/CR4 virtualization).
